---
title: "The relationship between Gross Domestic Product per capita and Life Expectancy."
author: "Emma Rand"
engine: knitr
format:
  html
execute:
  echo: false
  include: true
  error: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
library(tidyverse)
```

# Introduction

There is a relationship between wealth and health. We will explore this
relationship using the relationship between [Gross Domestic Product
(GDP)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gross_domestic_product) *per
capita* and Life Expectancy across countries and over time.

```{r}
#| label: import-data
file <- "data-raw/gapminder.tsv"
gapminder <- read_tsv(file)
```

# Methods

# Results

# Discussion

# References
